{{Infobox character
| name = Shera
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Consultant, Izyrian gladiator, Consultant assassin, The Knife, Gardener, Apprentice of Ayana
| abilities = uses shears as a weapon, uses a knife and shears in combat, uses a spade as a weapon
| affiliations = Guild's order of assassins
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Shera Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shera is a formidable individual known by several titles, including the [[Knife]], the Killer, and the latest of the [[Am’haranai]]. She is a double [[Soulbound]] who has bound her soul to an ancient weapon created from the [[Emperor's power]] and has also absorbed the [[essence]] of a destroyed [[Handmaiden]], effectively acting as a bridge between the [[Emperor's power]] and her own. This unique connection makes her a significant threat to humanity, valued by the [[Elder]] [[Kelarac]] almost as highly as the [[Emperor's throne]]. A skilled and lethal combatant, Shera utilizes various weapons including a [[bronze knife]], daggers, a poisoned needle, and a left-hand shear. She is capable of extreme feats, such as deflecting the blade of a [[Champion]] and moving with sudden, stealthy precision. Her combat style is often driven by intense bloodlust or a calculated, icy detachment used to clear her mind. Throughout her history, she has attempted to kill several individuals, including [[Naberius]] and [[Calder]], though her motivations have often centered on larger goals like securing the [[Heart]] or stopping [[Urzaia]]. Despite her reputation for violence and her tendency to shirk duties in favor of sleep, Shera possesses a distinct sense of responsibility and rarely leaves a task unfinished. She has experience working with [[the Emperor]] and has faced the [[Children of Nakothi]] directly. While she has expressed a lack of desire for eternal [[life]] or the influence of the [[Elders]], she remains a central figure in ongoing conflicts involving [[the Emperor]], the [[Guilds]], and the future of humanity.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Shera is a blond [[Izyrian gladiator]] and [[Consultant]] assassin characterized by bright orange eyes with vertical slit pupils. During a nighttime raid, she attacked [[Calder]]'s group to abduct his wife and later struck [[Tristania]] across her coat-shrouded back. Seeking [[Naberius]], she engaged in combat against [[Calder]] and [[Andel]] while wielding an [[Awakened]] emerald blade alongside a [[bronze knife]] and silver throwing blade. After carrying [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]] to [[Lucan]] for inspection, she received well wishes from [[Calder]] for an upcoming fight.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a [[Consultant]] who attacked [[Calder]]'s group while they were sleeping and took his wife.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a potential threat mentioned by [[Tristania]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a character who wants [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] struck [[Tristania]]’s coat-shrouded back.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia]] lands near [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is an [[Izyrian gladiator]] and a [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] attacked [[Calder]] and [[Andel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a [[Consultant]] assassin.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a blond [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] carried [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]] to [[Lucan]] for inspection.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a [[Consultant]] who wields a bronze blade.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] has done everything for [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a figure in black with a [[bronze knife]] and a silver throwing blade.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] is a blond [[Consultant]] with bright orange eyes and vertical slit pupils.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] wields an old [[bronze knife]] and an [[Awakened]] emerald blade.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wishes [[Shera]] luck in a fight.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Born in the underside of the [[Capital]] and once a street beggar, Shera worked cleaning the city under [[Maxwell]] before joining the [[Guild]]'s order of assassins. Known as the [[Knife]], she completed the assassination of [[Kamba Nomen]] and later trained as an apprentice to [[Ayana]] to become a [[Gardener]]. As a student, she was considered lazy and unpredictable, though she wields specialized tools including a bronze shear, a green shear invested with [[Intent]], and various blades. After being adopted into the [[Consultants]] by [[Kerian]], she became a prospective [[Consultant]] and the intended user of the weapon [[Syphren]]. While navigating [[Gray Island]], she demonstrated combat proficiency using spades, needles, and [[alchemy]] flares, even displaying the ability to steal power from [[Elderspawn]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is the [[Knife]] in killing operations.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a character who has completed the assassination of [[Kamba Nomen]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was sitting on top of a cage with a bloody knife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a character who studies client files.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a character who heard [[Anthem User]] laughing.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] killed someone she thought deserved it.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] used to be a beggar on the streets.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] carries a small knife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a hidden pocket sewn into the inside of her clothing.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has pulled a knife on [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was born in the underside of the [[Capital]] and worked cleaning up the city under [[Maxwell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] carries a bronze shear in her right hand.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses a paralyzing needle.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a character who left her [[workshop]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses a bronze shear on her left that she never draws.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a member of the [[Guild]]'s order of assassins.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was conditioned by [[Maxwell]]'s attacks to wake and respond to even the slightest sounds.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is interested in breakfast more than [[Guild]] history.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] uses a stolen knife to attack the prisoner.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] seized the prisoner's wrist and pushed it against his body.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] visited a familiar clearing in the forest.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses a left-hand shear.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a person who can use shears as a weapon.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a student training to be a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is an apprentice of [[Ayana]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is not a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a student described as lazy and unpredictable.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera's shears]] are invested with [[Intent]] from generations of [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was being treated for severe burns in an infirmary.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] uses a knife and shears in combat.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] uses a spade as a weapon.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s second shear has [[Intent]] bound in the blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses a bronze blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has previously taken a piece of a [[Great Elder]] back to the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] wears [[Gardener blacks]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a [[Gardener]] who uses a bronze blade and invested shears.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a wounded shoulder.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] carries the [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses a shear.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a blade on her left side that whispers laughter.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] watched [[Albadol Crane]] from a cramped trunk.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses a shear with enough [[Intent]] to break through a lock.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was once commanded by [[the Emperor]] to protect the [[Empire]] even from himself.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is determined to see [[Calder]] dead.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] can go dark and cold, causing the person [[Lucan]] knows to disappear.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was adopted into the [[Consultants]] by [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is someone [[Lucan]] seeks to protect and a prospective [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is the intended user of the weapon [[Syphren]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a professional who knows ships.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a [[Gardener]] with [[Consultant]] training.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is heading for [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] intends to deliver the knife to [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] ran deeper into the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] could hear a faint heartbeat echoing through the whole [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] wears a mask over her nose and mouth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is a fighter who uses shears and spades.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] was stopped by [[Calder Marten]] in the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] caught her [[Awakened]] shear out of the air.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] possesses two shears: a bronze one in her right hand and a green one in her left.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] uses [[alchemy]] flares.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s combat style involves using spades, needles, and hidden daggers.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s expression is described as absolutely blank and her eyes as dead as a snake's.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] can steal power from [[Elderspawn]], creating green wisps around her body.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] can create a pale spirit of a fireball.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] used her shears to attempt to strike the [[Elder]] while falling.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] received a small scroll tied with a green ribbon from a [[Waverider scout]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An assassin of significant reputation, Shera is known for a ruthless efficiency that would have seen a captain killed instantly. As an ally and consultant to [[Lucan]], she possesses an [[Awakened weapon]] and is suspected of being a [[Soulbound]]. Her lethality was demonstrated when she killed [[Urzaia]], marking her as a great threat to others. During her actions involving [[The Testament]], she pushed [[Jerri]] over the vessel's railing and into the ocean.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] is mentioned by [[Meia]] as someone who would have killed the captain immediately.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] is an assassin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] possesses an [[Awakened weapon]] and may be a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] is a [[Consultant]] and an ally of [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] killed [[Urzaia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] is considered a great threat.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] pushed [[Jerri]] over [[The Testament]]'s railing into the ocean.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A professional assassin and [[Gardener]] trained by [[Jarelys Teach]], Shera spent most of the last seven years within the [[Imperial Palace]] as a pet of [[the Emperor]]. Operating as a [[Soulbound]] [[Consultant]] and associate of [[Lucan]], she utilized bronze blades, shears imbued with [[Intent]], and heavy knives to carry out her mission of killing [[the Emperor]] before he became a threat. During her final confrontation, she engaged in blade-to-blade combat with [[Calder Marten]] and successfully killed [[the Emperor]]. After utilizing stolen energy from a [[Great Elder]], she swayed over [[Darius]] before collapsing from exhaustion and eventually returning to her own body once the [[Reading]] concluded.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a [[Gardener]] and an assassin.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a professional who enters and exits rooms before her client.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has experienced [[Maxwell]]'s ambushes and years of [[Gardener training]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is working toward something.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a character who uses shears and bronze blades in combat.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a pet assassin of [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a [[Soulbound]] [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] carries two heavy knives dense with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] possesses [[Soulbound powers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s job is to kill [[the Emperor]] before he becomes a threat.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] spoke up and named [[Ach'magut]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] uses a poisoned needle to kill.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] hurled a green knife toward the door.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] swayed over [[Darius]] with stolen energy tingling inside her skin before collapsing.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] collapsed after stating she was getting tired.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] killed [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is an associate of [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] fights blade-to-blade with [[Calder Marten]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a [[Gardener]] who trains with [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a [[Consultant]] who visited [[Lucan]] while he was in prison.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is considered a threat to [[Calder]] and the future of humanity.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has spent most of the last seven years inside the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a [[Soulbound]] without her [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has [[Mason]] training.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] feels [[the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] as bands of iron.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] spent a week in [[Lucan's cell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is a person who can slit a man's throat and use the same knife to cut meat.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] returned to her own body after the [[Reading]] ended.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera's shear]] was given [[Intent]] by [[Jarelys Teach]] and [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] held the [[Heart of Nakothi]] on a chain.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] was aimed and released like an arrow.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has stolen power from a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] fell asleep on the hard wood of the deck.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] was confused by the term '[[Guild Head]]'.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Known as the Killer, Shera is a member of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] who wears hooded pale gray clothing and a cloth mask covering her face. During an encounter where she stood beside [[Estyr]], she killed [[Urzaia]] and kidnapped [[Jerri]] while remaining unarmed. As the [[Guild Head]] of the [[Gardeners]], this dark-haired individual with ice-cold eyes unsealed her second [[Vessel]] to become a double [[Soulbound]], wielding a blue blade and a glowing green blade. Her chaotic mentality, which suggests three people inhabit her body, was displayed as she plunged a dagger into [[Calder]]. Despite claiming to have killed [[Kelarac]], Shera later used a green dagger to fight [[Elderspawn]] and was eventually seen with [[Calder]] and the [[Regents]], though her ultimate [[fate]] remains uncertain.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is known as the Killer.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] wears pale gray clothing with a gray hood and cloth covering her mouth and nose.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] has a [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] killed [[Urzaia]] and kidnapped [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is a hooded individual standing to the left of [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is unarmed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is the [[Guild Head]] of the [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] has dark hair and ice-cold eyes with crushing depths.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] has a line of blood drawn across her cheek.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] was pulled back into the mist by a thorny vine made of golden light.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is a [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]]'s mentality is perceived as pure chaos, appearing as if three people are living in her body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] wields a blue blade in her right hand and a glowing green blade in her left.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] unsealed her second [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is a double [[Soulbound]] with the strength to deflect a [[Champion]]'s blade.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is of the [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] killed [[Calder]] by plunging a dagger into him.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] watched [[Calder]] with cold, dark eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] has an ally named [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] has dreams of [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|If [[Shera]] had removed [[Kelarac]], the [[Independents]] would have taken over the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] intends to use the [[Optasia]] to find and punish [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] wants to get even with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] uses a green dagger to fight [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] wears a hooded gray outfit and a half-mask.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] released his grip on [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] wears a mask of gray cloth covering the lower half of her face.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] has short black hair.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] carries daggers.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] claims to have killed [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is present with [[Calder]] and the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] is nearby as indicated by [[silver mist]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Something may have happened to [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]]'s eyes reminded [[Calder]] of a shark's.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|An [[Architect]] and member of the [[Guild]], Shera holds the title of [[Mistress of the Mists]] while being forced to serve as a [[Guild Head]]. During her service to the [[Empire]], she endured multiple gunshot wounds to her leg, shoulder, stomach, and arm, and suffered the loss of her right ear. As a [[Soulbound]] with two [[Vessels]], she utilizes the power of [[Bastion]] and its [[Veil]] to create cages of thorny vines and [[gold light]]. After killing [[Calder Marten]] on behalf of the [[Guild]], she engaged a [[Great Elder]] using her [[Vessels]] and a green blade, eventually absorbing energy from [[Kelarac]] and personally stabbing him in the back. Following these conflicts, Shera found herself possessing a [[Great Elder]]'s power within her while leading an army of [[Soulbound]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] holds the title of [[Mistress of the Mists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is being forced to act as a [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The room [[Shera]] is in is invested and alchemically sealed against eavesdropping.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] plucked a jar from [[Nathanael Bareius]]'s hand.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is wounded in the leg by a gunshot.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is an Independent [[Guild]] leader.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is a member of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is an [[Architect]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[High Council]] pushed [[Shera]] to kill [[the Emperor]] sooner than planned.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is capable of killing [[Calder Marten]] in many ways even while unarmed.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] prepared to drop from the edge of a wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] uses the power of [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is a character who uses [[Bastion]] and can see through the [[Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s body is sick and tender.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] threatened the group with a thousand lashes and being drawn and quartered.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] encouraged [[Lucan]] to free the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has served the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] asks how to open the coffins.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is a [[Soulbound]] with two [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] carries [[Syphren]] in her left hand.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] was trailing behind the [[Mason]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] was trained in the [[Garden]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] uses a hooded quicklamp for light.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is wounded by gunfire in her shoulder, stomach, and left arm.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s right ear is missing.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is a character who uses the [[Soulbound]] power of [[Bastion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] wears a gray, hooded outfit that is both designed and invested for protection.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s [[Soulbound]] power creates a cage of [[Soulbound]] [[Intent]] using thorny vines and [[gold light]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] uses [[Syphren]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] used a gas bomb.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] hoped for a better result at [[the Emperor]]'s Stage.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] killed [[Calder]] on behalf of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] feels that victory in the [[Guild War]] brought many new responsibilities.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] retains the title of [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] had previously taken several bullets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] recognizes she is in a unique position to direct the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is fighting a [[Great Elder]] tomorrow.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has [[Vessels]] that experience urges.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] uses her [[Vessels]] and the green blade to fight the [[Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] realized the light was coming from [[Hightower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] channels [[life]] absorbed from her [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] uses [[Bastion]] to ward off the [[Elder]]'s power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] compresses the [[silver mist]] of [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s body was cleansed by a golden light.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] froze an inch from [[Darius]]' chest.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] grabbed [[Meia]]'s head to prevent her from looking at the celestial figures clashing in the [[void]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] personally stabbed [[Kelarac]] in the back.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] wondered why the [[Guild Heads]] cared about a man's survival.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] and the rest of the mortals crammed as many allies on their ships as possible.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has an army of [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] wondered if [[Bareius]], [[Calder Marten]], and [[Jyrine]] had planned to betray her to the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has energy she took from [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] possesses a [[Great Elder]]'s power inside her.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has twin [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“What if Shera decides to attack us while we’re running around on our own?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"Consultant Shera and I have a separate account to balance,"<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“He shot a friend of mine,” Shera said. “We were only supposed to kill people who deserved it. I thought he deserved it.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Protect the Empire,” he had commanded her once. “Even, if necessary, from me.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“You go dark, and cold, and the person I know goes away.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Assassins]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
